title: VStack
description: Stack shortcut with vertical direction. Stacks children in a column with consistent spacing and alignment.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Stacks children vertically with system spacing.

spacings.title: Spacings
spacings.desc: Pick the vertical gap based on the desired density.

divider.title: With divider
divider.desc: Inserts horizontal separators between each element.

props.divider: Inserts a horizontal Divider between each child.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the vertical stack
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive layout element; does not participate in the tab order
